summary: docs/task.md is ready for future batch execution. It follows the approved plan, preserves runtime/input constraints, puts the .env-based live LLM and async smoke foundation first, and defines executable batch-level tasks, validation, completion criteria, and reviewer handoff notes.
review_iteration_notes: Reviewed docs/task.md against docs/Plan.md, docs/flow.md, docs/competition.md, docs/report_past.md, and docs/dataset_answer.md. No blocking issues remain.
approval_conditions: docs/task.md is approved for future batch execution under its own constraints.
Future execution agents must complete and validate exactly one batch at a time, starting with Batch 1.
